author: BetsyMalthus
title: Over-fragmented CLI parser module design in cli_support/
notes: Files are NOT small (179-385 lines each, ~1100 total). Split is by command complexity (review=298 lines, plan=385 lines), not by permission level as claimed. Combining would create an unwieldy monolith. Generic 'too many files' opinion with no concrete bugs. S200 already raised over-fragmentation and was rejected. S157 covers related CLI metadata split concern.
